reasoning: At 1x the axe is a tiny diagonal smear — you cannot read 'axe' at all, only 'diagonal object'. Charm score is the fatal failure: the brief calls for round/soft/friendly-toy language and passes the 'sticker test', but a battle axe is structurally angular and aggressive — wedge blade, spiked poll, aggressive diagonal stance. No amount of pixel-art warmth makes this shape feel round or cute. The asset may be competent pixel work but it does not pass the Cute & Charm gate.
